name: Layered Gold Mangalsutra
description: A contemporary take on the sacred mangalsutra — three strands of fine black beads intertwined with 22kt gold, culminating in a hand-pressed pendant of woven gold wire. Modern enough for everyday wear, meaningful enough for a lifetime.
careInstructions: Do not pull the chain. Store flat in the provided box. Keep away from harsh chemicals.
shipping: Ships within 3–5 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
